title: McKelvey Engineering students, alumni win NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
summary_en: Prestigious program supports graduate students with high potential to impact scientific innovation.
title_cn: 麦凯尔维工程学院学生及校友荣获美国国家科学基金会研究生研究奖学金

title: Cook, Schwabl receive 2026 Ralph S. Quatrano Prize
summary_en: Ben Cook and Suzy Schwabl honored for outstanding achievements.
title_cn: 库克、施瓦布获颁2026年度拉尔夫·S.夸特拉诺奖

title: WashU Expert: Managing Mythos
summary_en: Ning Zhang explains what people should know about easy-to-use artificial intelligence (AI) software tools.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学专家：破除认知迷思

title: McKelvey Engineering students design device tailored to fit needs of visually impaired
summary_en: The Locus Suit enables independent navigation.
title_cn: 麦凯尔维工程学院学生设计专为视障人士需求量身定制的装置

title: McKelvey Engineering faculty selected for AI Curriculum Corps
summary_en: Faculty to participate in summer program to integrate or critically examine AI in classroom.
title_cn: 麦凯尔维工程学院教员入选人工智能课程工作组
